category_sources: source_facts.description says it accesses credentials via libsecret; official Git credential helpers page lists git-credential-libsecret under platform-specific credential storage.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is git-credential-libsecret; official Git credential helpers page uses git-credential-libsecret.
docs_sources: Official git-scm.com credential helpers page documents git-credential-libsecret as a Linux secret-service credential helper.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is git-scm.com and the official Git source-control repository is https://github.com/git/git, containing contrib/credential/libsecret.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Git credential helper using libsecret; official git-scm.com credential helpers page lists it as Linux secret-service storage.
